title: I get to do this differently
subtitle: An affirmation for when the family pattern is visible and you are choosing not to repeat it.
excerpt: A short affirmation for the moment you can see the pattern clearly and you are ready to step out of it. Say it three times, out loud, whenever you make a money choice that the old pattern would not have made.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 11 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Release fear of repeating family patterns."

content.text: A short affirmation for the moment you see the old pattern and decide not to follow it. The statement is most useful said out loud in a real moment: when you close the banking app instead of checking compulsively, when you pay yourself first, when you don't accept less than your rate.
I get to do this differently. The pattern stops with me. This decision is mine.
Say it three times in the morning as a daily anchor. Also say it in the moment you are about to repeat the old choice. Before the click, before the email, before saying yes when you mean no.
Adapted from Day 11 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), which addresses the fear of repeating inherited money patterns.
